evals.name: define-ecommerce
evals.prompt: Tenemos un e-commerce de ropa y el trimestre pasado facturamos $500K. Queremos llegar a $750K el próximo trimestre. Ayudame a definir los objetivos de marketing.
evals.expected_output: Should produce 1-3 SMART marketing objectives with KPIs, baselines, targets, and math showing how the numbers connect to the revenue goal. Should use e-commerce funnel KPIs. Should identify the funnel stage(s) to focus on.

evals.name: refine-vague-goal
evals.prompt: Nuestro objetivo es 'aumentar la presencia digital de la marca'. Está bien?
evals.expected_output: Should identify this as a vague goal, explain what's missing (metric, number, timeframe, baseline, funnel stage), ask targeted questions, and produce a refined SMART version of the objective.

evals.name: validate-too-many
evals.prompt: Queremos: 1) Generar 500 leads mensuales, 2) Reducir el CAC un 40%, 3) Posicionarnos como líderes en el mercado, 4) Aumentar el engagement en redes, 5) Mejorar la tasa de conversión del sitio
evals.expected_output: Should validate each objective with SMART check, flag that 5 objectives is too many (recommend max 3), identify which are well-formed vs poorly-formed, spot conflicts (volume + cost reduction), and suggest a prioritized rewrite.
